name: repo-bootstrap
description: Bootstrap a repository to use Claude Code plugins from a marketplace: safely merges .claude/settings.json (idempotent, never clobbers), optional CI, --list, --dry-run, --print-only (manual/classifier-safe mode), and a one-paste /plugin CLI fallback. With --portka-standard it also installs the Portka standard setup — a workflow CLAUDE.md, a git/gh permissions allowlist, and an enforced SemVer version sync that binds to the repo's existing version (package.json / pyproject.toml / Cargo.toml / VERSION / README) with a basic test suite, plus a native version-sync test (node:test / unittest) for JS/Python repos.
